---
id: cors-origins-controller-create-cors-origin
title: "Create a CORS origin"
description: "Creates a new CORS origin for the current environment. CORS origins allow browser-based applications to make requests to the WorkOS API."
sidebar_label: "Create a CORS origin"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a CORS origin"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user_management/cors_origins"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new CORS origin for the current environment. CORS origins allow browser-based applications to make requests to the WorkOS API.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
